nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2017; const int b = 2044; const int c = 2072; const int d = 2099; const int e = 2127; const int f = 2154; const int g = 2182; const int h = 2209; const int i = 2236; const int j = 2264; const int k = 2291; const int l = 2319; const int m = 2346; const int n = 2374; const int o = 2401;
